case_title: AUDREY DENISE FOUNTAIN VS. DOUGLAS TEXIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOUNTAIN, AUDREY DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT TEXIN, DOUGLAS DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-11-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-05-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-26-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-20-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST AUDREY DENISE FOUNTAIN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-20-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-04-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LAVON GRANGER, CSR #1890. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-15-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST AUDREY DENISE FOUNTAIN FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-15-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-30-2003. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY PATRICIA VAN STEENBERGE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2003 CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-10-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING DEC-10-2003 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

parties.name: FOUNTAIN, AUDREY DENISE 148 APPLETON AVENUE SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94118

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by Leticia Perez, CSR 7782. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-15-2003 Continued To Dec-10-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in propria persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/10/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by Patricia Van Steenberge. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2003 Continued To Oct-15-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/15/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger, CSR #1890. (212)
